items.how_used: 将乘客出站过程划分为四个阶段，并采用 d/d/s 排队模型计算各阶段时间，包括下车、平台行走、排队和楼梯行走。

items.source_excerpt: We used the knowledge of former research and d/d/s queuing model in order to calculate the time of the four periods.

items.how_used: 采用元胞自动机模型模拟乘客出站过程，考虑拥堵对移动速度和规则的影响，并可视化模拟过程。
items.source_excerpt: we adopted a simulation approach based on cellular automaton model. Different from the mathematical model, the simulation model simulated several periods of unloading processes as a complete process, and considered the effects of congestion on the moving speed and moving rule of passengers.

items.how_used: 改变列车到达数量、楼梯位置、楼梯数量和每个楼梯容量等变量，运行模拟模型观察对卸载时间的影响。
items.source_excerpt: To understand the effect of different factors, we changed variables such as the number of trains arriving, the location and number of staircases, and the capacity of each staircase to see their impact on unloading time.

items.how_used: 列出8条模型假设，包括每节车厢容量、楼梯均匀分布、所有乘客下车、单队列、乘客选择最近出口等，并给出每条假设的合理性说明。
items.source_excerpt: In order to streamline our model, we have made several key assumptions. Assumption: Each car of a train can contain 90 people. Justification: There are 5 seats in each row in the given information...

items.how_used: 定义了15个变量符号，包括列车数N、车厢数n、车厢长度d、站台长度p、站台宽度w、楼梯台阶数q、楼梯容量k、每阶容量c、楼梯数量s、平台行走速度v_p、输入率λ、输出率μ、下车时间t0、平台行走时间t1、排队时间t2、楼梯行走时间t3、疏散时间t、卸载时间t'。
items.source_excerpt: 2.3 Variables • N is the number of trains arriving at the same time. N is 1 or 2. • n is the number of car to a train. A full train contains 90n passengers. ...

items.how_used: 使用流程图展示乘客出站过程的四个阶段（下车、平台行走、排队、楼梯行走），并引用北京轨道交通下车时间与人数关系的散点图及拟合曲线。
items.source_excerpt: As shown in Fig.1, the process what a passenger exits the station includes four periods: 1. waits at the queue inside a car to exit the train; 2. walks towards the staircase; 3. waits in the queue to go upstairs; 4. moves upwards on a staircase.
